key_insights.insight: Success comes from connecting seemingly unrelated ideas from different disciplines.
key_insights.quote: I connect the dots in new ways.

key_insights.insight: Creativity requires a constant influx of new information to generate novel ideas.
key_insights.quote: If you don't have enough top of funnel you dry up at the bottom where you know there's nothing that comes through

key_insights.insight: Being able to objectively evaluate and discard your own ideas is crucial for business success.
key_insights.quote: You have to be able to edit so interesting I completely agree I think about the the successes I've had in my life.

key_insights.insight: Not everyone is suited for generating new ideas, and that's okay; the world needs people with different skill sets.
key_insights.quote: So there is going to be a cohort of people who just don't think of new ideas and they're probably really good at other things. And that's okay because the world needs all of them, right?

key_insights.insight: Passion for improving people's lives can be a strong motivator for building a successful business.
key_insights.quote: If it's improving people's existence, then I'm passionate about it.

key_insights.insight: It is important to scan everything and sometimes even force yourself to read material that you have no interest in, as there may be an idea you can use within it.
key_insights.quote: Sometimes I'll just force myself to read something that I have no interest in at all just because there might be something in there.

actionable_advice.advice: Actively seek information from various sources and disciplines, even those outside your immediate interests.
actionable_advice.how_to: Subscribe to newsletters, read books, and attend talks on diverse subjects to broaden your knowledge base.

actionable_advice.advice: Objectively evaluate your own ideas and be willing to discard those that don't resonate or have limited market potential.
actionable_advice.how_to: Solicit feedback from trusted sources, analyze market trends, and conduct pilot tests to assess the viability of your ideas.

memorable_stories: An art teacher giving the guest the book 'Originals' by Adam Grant and saying it reminded them of her.
Description of people's happiness after receiving treatments at Bliss and opening up Beauty Pie boxes.
contrarian_claims: Having a business plan and going to Harvard doesn't necessarily mean a company will have a passion for the product.
The guest suggests that passion for improving people's lives is more important than simply making money.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 36 - How To Create Great Ideas: Marcia Kilgore
